task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Lock Date settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Manager.io interface on the 'Lock Date' settings screen.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct lock date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the date '31/12/2024' or '2024-12-31' entered into the Lock Date input field.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Form Defaults settings for Sales Invoices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Manager.io interface on the 'Form Defaults' screen specifically for 'Sales Invoice'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the specified payment terms into the Sales Invoice footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
A screenshot showing the exact text 'Payment Terms: Net 15 Days.
Bank: First National Bank
Account: 555-0199
Thank you for your business!' entered into the Custom Text or Footer field.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the updated settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the agent clicking the 'Update' or 'Create' button to save the Form Defaults and Lock Date changes, or a subsequent screen showing the changes were successfully applied.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating http://localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands or API scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the Manager.io accounting software, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or direct file modifications to the Manager.io application data.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The application is Manager.io running at http://localhost:8080. The expected lock date is 2024-12-31 (or 31/12/2024 depending on locale formatting). The exact expected footer text for Sales Invoices is:
Payment Terms: Net 15 Days.
Bank: First National Bank
Account: 555-0199
Thank you for your business!
